LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MARY ELIZABETH INN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO STATE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO CONSTITUTE A CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST MOVING PARTY. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD, IF SHE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, A CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) AND MATERIAL FACTS TO SUPPORT THOSE CAUSE(S) OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARY ELIZABETH INN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 15, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE DEFENDANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND 2.6C. DEFENDANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 15, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE DEMURRER WILL BE SUSTAINED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Continued To Nov-20-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ALLISON MICHELLE BARTON, TEL. NO. 596-7953, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO-PER;
ATTY. ALLISON PASCAL OF ZANGHI, TORRES & ARSHAWSKY, TEL. NO. 977-0444 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARY ELIZABETH INN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. No opposition filed. The Complaint fails to state facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action against moving party. Plaintiff is given 20 days leave to amend to plead, if she can do so in good faith, a cause of action against Defendant(s) and material facts to support those cause(s) of action. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185
=(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Continued To Aug-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ALLISON MICHELLE BARTON, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARY ELIZABETH INN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Continued to August 15, 2013 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6C. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and the operative Complaint to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 15, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the demurrer will be sustained. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
